; reTasker: add an "open viewer" button to the notebook toolbar.
;
; Targets Toolbar.qml, the writing-view toolbar (pen/eraser/
; selection + undo/redo). We append one ArkControls.ToolButton at the end of
; the tool GridLayout; tapping it asks AppLoad to launch the reTasker viewer
; fullscreen. Because the viewer is a fullscreen overlay, closing it drops the
; user straight back into the notebook they launched it from.
;
; Unhashed on purpose: Xochitl ships its QML as plaintext, so real identifiers
; match directly and we avoid a hashtab dependency.

AFFECT /qt/qml/xofm/libs/toolbar/qml/Toolbar.qml
    IMPORT net.asivery.AppLoad 1.0

    TRAVERSE FocusScope#root > Item#toolbar > GridLayout#toolLayout
        LOCATE BEFORE Repeater[.objectName="secondaryTools"]
        INSERT {
            ArkControls.ToolButton {
                id: retaskerOpenViewer
                objectName: "retasker-open-viewer-button"
                focusPolicy: Qt.NoFocus
                visible: root.expanded
                iconSource: "qrc:/ark/icons/checkmark_circle"
                onClicked: AppLoadLauncher.launchApplication("retasker", [], ({}), false)
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
